deploy.startCommand: python -c "import os; keys=[k for k in os.environ if any(x in k.upper() for x in ['DATABASE','POSTGRES','PGHOST','PGPORT','PGUSER','PGPASS','PGDATA','PGDB'])]; print('DB env vars found:', keys or 'NONE')" && python manage.py collectstatic --noinput && python manage.py migrate_schemas --shared && gunicorn config.wsgi:application --bind 0.0.0.0:$PORT --workers 2 --timeout 120
